metadata.description: Non-invasive, evidence-backed agent capabilities from Recursive Harness.

plugins.name: recursive-observe
plugins.description: Score predictions with private sidecar state and zero repository writes.

plugins.name: recursive-learn
plugins.description: Turn private corrections into reviewable improvements with zero default repository writes.

plugins.name: recursive-verify
plugins.description: Produce read-only repository proof without executing repository code.

plugins.name: recursive-coordinate
plugins.description: Coordinate local agents with atomic claims and private handoffs.
